name: Ryan Specialty Holdings, Inc.
description: Ryan Specialty Holdings, Inc. is an international specialty insurance firm that provides innovative solutions for insurance brokers, agents, and carriers. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company operates as a wholesale distributor and underwriting manager. It offers a wide range of specialized insurance products and services, including wholesale brokerage, binding authority, and underwriting management, serving as a trusted trading partner to help clients navigate complex risks across the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and other international markets.
